meta.title: AllyOS Peptide Stack Family Master Selector — v1 (DRAFT)
meta.source: peptide_stack_family_master_v1 (physician-authored). Canonical top-level selector for the peptides line. Full source in protocols/peptide-stack-families/. Supersedes the v0.4 stack recommender and the loose stacks.list in peptide-iv-support.json.
meta.curated_by: Armando A. Falcon, MD (FL ME 84789) — RenuviaMD® PLLC, AllyOS Compliance Division
meta.architecture: client goal → ONE stack family → 2/3/4-peptide build → safety gate → IV/IM support match → standing order.

order: route to standing order only if cleared

build_size.4: advanced; stronger provider review + safety-gate pass

hard_rules: Select ONE primary family first. Do NOT assemble cross-family stacks unless the provider explicitly overrides and documents the rationale.
Builds are NOT automatic escalation — patient risk + provider judgment determine 2 vs 3 vs 4.

families.name: Metabolic / GLP / Body-Composition
families.evidence_language: Highest evidence sits with the GLP/GIP anchor pharmacology/weight-management trials; IV/IM is wellness support only.
do_not_claim: routine IV for all GLP clients

families.name: GH / Lean Mass / Recovery
families.evidence_language: GH/IGF-1 axis support; IV ingredients support recovery/nutrient wellness, not GH peptide potentiation.

families.name: Mitochondrial / Energy / Longevity
families.evidence_language: Axis-aligned mitochondrial energy support; human outcome evidence limited/mixed; no anti-aging guarantee.

families.name: Repair / Injury / Connective Tissue
iv_im_support: magnesium if cramps/recovery and renal screen clear
families.evidence_language: Recovery/repair wellness support; most peptide evidence remains preclinical/mechanistic.

families.name: Skin / Hair / Glow / Aesthetic
families.evidence_language: Aesthetic wellness support; biotin allowed by wellness goal but nondeficient hair outcome evidence limited.

families.name: Sexual Vitality / HPG Axis
iv_im_support: magnesium if stress/tension and renal screen clear
families.evidence_language: Sexual wellness / HPG-axis support; IV nutrients are readiness/support only, not libido outcome proof.
families.key_gate: BP/HR matters with the PT-141/bremelanotide axis (uncontrolled HTN / CVD are label contraindications); oral naltrexone review.

families.name: Neuro / Focus / Calm / Sleep
families.language_guardrail: Do NOT claim treatment of anxiety, insomnia, ADHD, depression, or cognitive disease. Gate on acute neuro symptoms / psychiatric instability / suicidality.

families.name: Immune / Inflammatory Wellness
families.evidence_language: Immune wellness support; not treatment of infection or immune disease.
families.key_gate: Active infection / fever / hypoxia / confusion / sepsis symptoms = DO NOT infuse; medical evaluation.

families.name: Non-GLP Fat-Loss / Metabolic Wellness
iv_im_support: Niagen/NR or NAD+ if energy/mitochondrial goal
families.key_gate: AOD efficacy-limitation language (failed a 24-wk 536-subject weight-loss trial); GH/IGF-1 glucose/edema/retinopathy review; MIC hepatic/gallbladder review.

iv_im_safety_delegation: Every iv_im_support group resolves to peptide-iv-support.json ingredient IDs, and every safety gate to the GLP gates / iv-module screens / wellness_iv_hard_stop rules — ONE safety source of truth. This selector adds the family/build/selector layer ON TOP; it does not restate doses or contraindications (no doses; routes to the locked standing order).

new_peptides_needing_monograph.note: In v1 builds but NOT in the locked 30-peptide library. Author monographs (grade, consent tier, contraindications, monitoring) before these builds are clinically usable.
new_peptides_needing_monograph.naming_note: 'thymosin beta-4' is the parent of TB-500 (TB-500 is the active fragment, already in the library) — reconcile to avoid duplication.
new_peptides_needing_monograph.topical_flag: FAM05's aesthetic pool — palmitoyl pentapeptide-4 (Matrixyl), acetyl hexapeptide-8 (Argireline), tripeptide-1 — are TOPICAL cosmeceutical peptides, NOT injectables. Confirm modality before listing them as a peptide 'stack'; they may belong to a topical/aesthetic offering, not IV/IM/SC.

supersedes: peptide-stack-families.json (prior draft), the v0.4 stack_axis recommender, and stacks.list + stack_recommender_example in peptide-iv-support.json. Migrate workspace.html stack monographs to these 9 families.
validation_cases_ref: protocols/peptide-stack-families/validation_cases_v1.csv (10 cases, incl. V1_010: 4-peptide energy build + chest pain → HARD STOP, do not route to IV/NAD until urgent eval).
sources_ref: protocols/peptide-stack-families/source_audit_v1.csv (22 sources — DailyMed labels, NEJM retatrutide, PubMed mechanistic, NIH ODS, FDA biotin, MSD Myers — each with does_not_support).

signoff_ledger.status: DRAFT — canonical v1 selector consolidated + staged; pending new-peptide monographs, FAM05 modality decision, re-audit, MD sign-off.
pending: Resolve FAM05 modality — cosmetic peptides are topical, not injectable.
Author monographs for the new injectable peptides (cagrilintide, pramlintide, Humanin, oxytocin, LL-37, thymulin, tuftsin); reconcile thymosin beta-4 vs TB-500.
Confirm each family's IV/IM groups resolve to peptide-iv-support ingredient IDs + the wellness_iv_hard_stop gate package exists.
Migrate workspace.html stack monographs to the 9 families.
3-auditor lock + Medical Director sign-off → set effective + flip to locked.
